calendar_view.definition:
WITH parents AS (
         SELECT e.id,
            e.user_id,
            e.account_id,
            e.event_id,
            e.title,
            e.description,
            e.location,
            e.start_time,
            e.end_time,
            e.start_timezone,
            e.end_timezone,
            e.status,
            e.html_link,
            e.meeting_link,
            e.is_recurring_parent,
            e.recurrence,
            e.recurring_event_id,
            NULL::timestamp with time zone AS original_start_time,
            NULL::text AS exception_type,
                CASE
                    WHEN ((e.recurrence IS NOT NULL) AND (e.recurrence ~~ '%UNTIL=%'::text)) THEN to_timestamp(regexp_replace(regexp_replace(e.recurrence, '.*UNTIL=([0-9TZ]+).*'::text, '\1'::text), 'Z$'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), 'YYYYMMDD"T"HH24MISS'::text)
                    ELSE NULL::timestamp with time zone
                END AS until,
            e.updated_at
           FROM calendar_events e
          WHERE e.is_recurring_parent
        ), instances AS (
         SELECT e.id,
            e.user_id,
            e.account_id,
            e.event_id,
            e.title,
            e.description,
            e.location,
            e.start_time,
            e.end_time,
            e.start_timezone,
            e.end_timezone,
            e.status,
            e.html_link,
            e.meeting_link,
            e.is_recurring_parent,
            e.recurrence,
            e.recurring_event_id,
            COALESCE(e.original_start_time, x.original_start_time) AS original_start_time,
            x.exception_type,
            NULL::timestamp with time zone AS until,
            e.updated_at
           FROM (calendar_events e
             LEFT JOIN calendar_recurrence_exceptions x ON (((x.account_id = e.account_id) AND (x.instance_event_id = e.event_id))))
          WHERE ((NOT e.is_recurring_parent) AND (e.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'cancelled'::text))
        ), cancelled_occurrences AS (
         SELECT x.id,
            x.user_id,
            x.account_id,
            COALESCE(x.instance_event_id, (x.id)::text) AS event_id,
            x.title,
            NULL::text AS description,
            NULL::text AS location,
            x.original_start_time AS start_time,
            x.original_start_time AS end_time,
            pe.start_timezone,
            pe.end_timezone,
            'cancelled'::text AS status,
            NULL::text AS html_link,
            NULL::text AS meeting_link,
            false AS is_recurring_parent,
            NULL::text AS recurrence,
            x.parent_event_id AS recurring_event_id,
            x.original_start_time,
            'cancelled'::text AS exception_type,
            NULL::timestamp with time zone AS until,
            x.updated_at
           FROM (calendar_recurrence_exceptions x
             JOIN calendar_events pe ON (((pe.account_id = x.account_id) AND (pe.event_id = x.parent_event_id))))
          WHERE (x.exception_type = 'cancelled'::text)
        ), filtered_instances AS (
         SELECT i.id,
            i.user_id,
            i.account_id,
            i.event_id,
            i.title,
            i.description,
            i.location,
            i.start_time,
            i.end_time,
            i.start_timezone,
            i.end_timezone,
            i.status,
            i.html_link,
            i.meeting_link,
            i.is_recurring_parent,
            i.recurrence,
            i.recurring_event_id,
            i.original_start_time,
            i.exception_type,
            i.until,
            i.updated_at
           FROM instances i
          WHERE (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
                   FROM parents p
                  WHERE ((p.account_id = i.account_id) AND (i.event_id ~~ like_escape((p.event_id || '\_%'::text), '\'::text)) AND (EXTRACT(dow FROM i.start_time) = EXTRACT(dow FROM p.start_time)) AND (EXTRACT(hour FROM i.start_time) = EXTRACT(hour FROM p.start_time)) AND (EXTRACT(minute FROM i.start_time) = EXTRACT(minute FROM p.start_time))))))
        ), base AS (
         SELECT parents.id,
            parents.user_id,
            parents.account_id,
            parents.event_id,
            parents.title,
            parents.description,
            parents.location,
            parents.start_time,
            parents.end_time,
            parents.start_timezone,
            parents.end_timezone,
            parents.status,
            parents.html_link,
            parents.meeting_link,
            parents.is_recurring_parent,
            parents.recurrence,
            parents.recurring_event_id,
            parents.original_start_time,
            parents.exception_type,
            parents.until,
            parents.updated_at
           FROM parents
        UNION ALL
         SELECT filtered_instances.id,
            filtered_instances.user_id,
            filtered_instances.account_id,
            filtered_instances.event_id,
            filtered_instances.title,
            filtered_instances.description,
            filtered_instances.location,
            filtered_instances.start_time,
            filtered_instances.end_time,
            filtered_instances.start_timezone,
            filtered_instances.end_timezone,
            filtered_instances.status,
            filtered_instances.html_link,
            filtered_instances.meeting_link,
            filtered_instances.is_recurring_parent,
            filtered_instances.recurrence,
            filtered_instances.recurring_event_id,
            filtered_instances.original_start_time,
            filtered_instances.exception_type,
            filtered_instances.until,
            filtered_instances.updated_at
           FROM filtered_instances
        UNION ALL
         SELECT cancelled_occurrences.id,
            cancelled_occurrences.user_id,
            cancelled_occurrences.account_id,
            cancelled_occurrences.event_id,
            cancelled_occurrences.title,
            cancelled_occurrences.description,
            cancelled_occurrences.location,
            cancelled_occurrences.start_time,
            cancelled_occurrences.end_time,
            cancelled_occurrences.start_timezone,
            cancelled_occurrences.end_timezone,
            cancelled_occurrences.status,
            cancelled_occurrences.html_link,
            cancelled_occurrences.meeting_link,
            cancelled_occurrences.is_recurring_parent,
            cancelled_occurrences.recurrence,
            cancelled_occurrences.recurring_event_id,
            cancelled_occurrences.original_start_time,
            cancelled_occurrences.exception_type,
            cancelled_occurrences.until,
            cancelled_occurrences.updated_at
           FROM cancelled_occurrences
        )
 SELECT id,
    user_id,
    account_id,
    event_id,
    title,
    description,
    location,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    start_timezone,
    end_timezone,
    status,
    html_link,
    meeting_link,
    is_recurring_parent,
    recurrence,
    recurring_event_id,
    original_start_time,
    exception_type,
    until,
    updated_at
   FROM base
  ORDER BY account_id, event_id, start_time;

keyword_performance_by_profile.definition:
WITH base AS (
         SELECT p.id AS post_id,
            p.social_account_id,
            sa.profile_id,
            pk.keyword,
            pk.type,
            p.like_count,
            p.comment_count,
            p.video_view_count,
            p.engagement_rate
           FROM ((post_keywords pk
             JOIN posts p ON ((pk.post_id = p.id)))
             JOIN social_accounts sa ON ((p.social_account_id = sa.id)))
          WHERE ((p.like_count IS NOT NULL) AND (p.engagement_rate IS NOT NULL))
        )
 SELECT profile_id,
    keyword,
    type,
    count(DISTINCT post_id) AS post_count,
    round(avg(like_count), 2) AS avg_likes,
    round(avg(comment_count), 2) AS avg_comments,
    round(avg(COALESCE(video_view_count, (0)::bigint)), 2) AS avg_views,
    round(avg(engagement_rate), 4) AS avg_engagement_rate,
    sum(like_count) AS total_likes,
    sum(comment_count) AS total_comments,
    sum(COALESCE(video_view_count, (0)::bigint)) AS total_views,
    max(engagement_rate) AS best_engagement_rate
   FROM base b
  GROUP BY profile_id, keyword, type
  ORDER BY (round(avg(engagement_rate), 4)) DESC;

social_account_growth.definition:
WITH base AS (
         SELECT h.social_account_id,
            h.snapshot_date,
            h.followers,
            h.avg_likes,
            h.avg_views,
            h.avg_comments,
            h.engagement_rate
           FROM social_account_metric_history h
        )
 SELECT b.social_account_id,
    b.snapshot_date,
    round(((((b.followers - d.followers))::numeric / (NULLIF(d.followers, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS follower_growth_daily,
    round(((((b.followers - w.followers))::numeric / (NULLIF(w.followers, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS follower_growth_weekly,
    round(((((b.followers - m.followers))::numeric / (NULLIF(m.followers, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS follower_growth_monthly,
    round(((((b.followers - y.followers))::numeric / (NULLIF(y.followers, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS follower_growth_yearly,
    round(((((b.avg_likes - d.avg_likes))::numeric / (NULLIF(d.avg_likes, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS like_growth_daily,
    round(((((b.avg_likes - w.avg_likes))::numeric / (NULLIF(w.avg_likes, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS like_growth_weekly,
    round(((((b.avg_likes - m.avg_likes))::numeric / (NULLIF(m.avg_likes, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS like_growth_monthly,
    round(((((b.avg_likes - y.avg_likes))::numeric / (NULLIF(y.avg_likes, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS like_growth_yearly,
    round(((((b.avg_views - d.avg_views))::numeric / (NULLIF(d.avg_views, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS view_growth_daily,
    round(((((b.avg_views - w.avg_views))::numeric / (NULLIF(w.avg_views, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS view_growth_weekly,
    round(((((b.avg_views - m.avg_views))::numeric / (NULLIF(m.avg_views, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS view_growth_monthly,
    round(((((b.avg_views - y.avg_views))::numeric / (NULLIF(y.avg_views, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS view_growth_yearly,
    round(((((b.avg_comments - d.avg_comments))::numeric / (NULLIF(d.avg_comments, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS comment_growth_daily,
    round(((((b.avg_comments - w.avg_comments))::numeric / (NULLIF(w.avg_comments, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS comment_growth_weekly,
    round(((((b.avg_comments - m.avg_comments))::numeric / (NULLIF(m.avg_comments, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS comment_growth_monthly,
    round(((((b.avg_comments - y.avg_comments))::numeric / (NULLIF(y.avg_comments, 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS comment_growth_yearly,
    round((((b.engagement_rate - d.engagement_rate) / NULLIF(d.engagement_rate, (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS engagement_growth_daily,
    round((((b.engagement_rate - w.engagement_rate) / NULLIF(w.engagement_rate, (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS engagement_growth_weekly,
    round((((b.engagement_rate - m.engagement_rate) / NULLIF(m.engagement_rate, (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS engagement_growth_monthly,
    round((((b.engagement_rate - y.engagement_rate) / NULLIF(y.engagement_rate, (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS engagement_growth_yearly
   FROM ((((base b
     LEFT JOIN base d ON (((d.social_account_id = b.social_account_id) AND (d.snapshot_date = (b.snapshot_date - '1 day'::interval)))))
     LEFT JOIN base w ON (((w.social_account_id = b.social_account_id) AND (w.snapshot_date = (b.snapshot_date - '7 days'::interval)))))
     LEFT JOIN base m ON (((m.social_account_id = b.social_account_id) AND (m.snapshot_date = (b.snapshot_date - '30 days'::interval)))))
     LEFT JOIN base y ON (((y.social_account_id = b.social_account_id) AND (y.snapshot_date = (b.snapshot_date - '365 days'::interval)))));

topic_group_performance_by_profile.definition:
WITH base AS (
         SELECT p.id AS post_id,
            p.social_account_id,
            sa.profile_id,
            tg.id AS group_id,
            tg.category_name AS group_name,
            p.like_count,
            p.comment_count,
            p.video_view_count,
            p.engagement_rate
           FROM ((((post_topics_join ptj
             JOIN post_topic_groups_join ptgj ON ((ptj.topic_id = ptgj.topic_id)))
             JOIN post_topic_groups tg ON ((ptgj.group_id = tg.id)))
             JOIN posts p ON ((ptj.post_id = p.id)))
             JOIN social_accounts sa ON ((p.social_account_id = sa.id)))
          WHERE ((p.like_count IS NOT NULL) AND (p.engagement_rate IS NOT NULL))
        )
 SELECT profile_id,
    group_id,
    group_name,
    count(DISTINCT post_id) AS post_count,
    round(avg(like_count), 2) AS avg_likes,
    round(avg(comment_count), 2) AS avg_comments,
    round(avg(COALESCE(video_view_count, (0)::bigint)), 2) AS avg_views,
    round(avg(engagement_rate), 4) AS avg_engagement_rate,
    sum(like_count) AS total_likes,
    sum(comment_count) AS total_comments,
    sum(COALESCE(video_view_count, (0)::bigint)) AS total_views,
    max(engagement_rate) AS best_engagement_rate
   FROM base b
  GROUP BY profile_id, group_id, group_name
  ORDER BY (round(avg(engagement_rate), 4)) DESC;

topic_keywords_by_profile.definition:
WITH base AS (
         SELECT ptg.id AS group_id,
            ptg.category_name AS group_name,
            pk.keyword,
            sa.profile_id,
            count(DISTINCT p.id) AS post_count,
            avg(p.like_count) AS avg_likes,
            avg(p.comment_count) AS avg_comments,
            avg(p.video_view_count) AS avg_views,
            avg(p.engagement_rate) AS avg_engagement_rate
           FROM ((((((post_topic_groups ptg
             JOIN post_topic_groups_join ptgj ON ((ptgj.group_id = ptg.id)))
             JOIN post_topics pt ON ((pt.id = ptgj.topic_id)))
             JOIN post_topics_join ptj ON ((ptj.topic_id = pt.id)))
             JOIN posts p ON ((p.id = ptj.post_id)))
             JOIN social_accounts sa ON ((sa.id = p.social_account_id)))
             JOIN post_keywords pk ON ((pk.post_id = p.id)))
          GROUP BY ptg.id, ptg.category_name, sa.profile_id, pk.keyword
        )
 SELECT group_id,
    group_name,
    keyword,
    profile_id,
    post_count,
    avg_likes,
    avg_comments,
    avg_views,
    avg_engagement_rate
   FROM base;
